# CWE-472: hidden form field trusted as immutable role for authorization.
lang: go
file: CWE-472-vulnerable.go
---
package sample

import (
	"net/http"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
	"gorm.io/gorm"
)

type refundForm struct {
	OrderID string `form:"order_id"`
	Role    string `form:"role"`
}

func RefundOrder(c *gin.Context, db *gorm.DB) {
	var body refundForm
	if err := c.ShouldBind(&body); err != nil {
		c.String(http.StatusBadRequest, err.Error())
		return
	}
	if body.Role != "manager" {
		c.String(http.StatusForbidden, "forbidden")
		return
	}
	db.Exec("UPDATE orders SET status = 'refunded' WHERE id = ?", body.OrderID)
	c.Status(http.StatusOK)
}
